visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short hair, wearing a green cap, glasses, and a grey 'CANADA ROOTS' sweatshirt, stands in a brightly lit indoor studio. He points toward the camera with his index finger. Brand logos '3c有趣思tim哥' and 'miko' are visible in the top corners. (2) A sharp graphic of black-rimmed glasses appears, followed by an exploded technical diagram of the glasses' internal components, including multiple layers of lenses and sensors. The background remains clean and focused on the product layout. (3) The scene cuts to first-person screen recordings showing hand-tracking technology with green skeletal overlays on moving hands. This is followed by a 3D room scan visualization using green lines to map out furniture and walls in a library setting. (4) The narrator reappears briefly before cutting to a monochrome camera feed showing a hand interacting with a circular desk lamp. The frame displays technical text 'CV camera' and shows real-time object detection boxes in a 3D wireframe environment. (5) A first-person view from the glasses shows the wearer picking up red onions in a supermarket, demonstrating object recognition. This is followed by a heart rate monitoring demo displaying pulsing heart icons and the numerical values '72' and '74'. (6) The man demonstrates the physical flexibility of the glasses by folding the temples. He is then shown standing next to a vertical display rack containing eight different sizes of the same glasses model. He ends with a smile and an excited facial expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有趣思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Logo]: miko. [Subtitle]: 我最愛的 Meta 智慧眼鏡. (2) [Subtitle]: 第二代要來了. (3) [Subtitle]: Meta近期公佈了 Aria Gen 2 智慧眼鏡 的硬體結構細節. (4) [Subtitle]: 相較於第一代版本 這次配備多項 先進感測還有運算技術. (5) [Subtitle]: 搭載了更進階的一個 眼動追蹤系統. (6) [Subtitle]: 提升人機互動流暢性 同時也搭載4顆 電腦視覺的攝影機. (7) [Subtitle]: 能夠進行3D手部還有物體追蹤. (8) [Variety]: 大幅升級. (9) [Subtitle]: 支援心率的監測 這些的身體數據. (10) [Subtitle]: 另外收音效果也變得更好了. (11) [Subtitle]: 重點這次外觀 配上了可折疊的鏡腳 更好攜帶. (12) [Subtitle]: 還提供 8種尺寸選擇 哎呦好期待喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male tech reviewer present throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a green flat cap, rectangular glasses, and a grey Roots brand long-sleeve sweatshirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a clean, slightly out-of-focus indoor studio. Other backgrounds include a library with bookshelves, a supermarket produce section, and various 3D technical interface overlays.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin over an upbeat electronic pop BGM with a steady 4/4 beat. A sharp 'whoosh' SFX triggers at the first second during a transition. (2) A bright 'ding' sound effect rings out as the hardware diagram is introduced. The BGM remains consistent with synthetic textures and a driving rhythm. (3) A sequence of digital 'click' and 'blip' SFX mimics the sound of a computer interface while the narrator describes sensors. The audio is studio-clean with no environmental noise. (4) A percussive 'thump' SFX is heard during a scene transition. The vocal delivery is energetic with high pitch variability. (5) As the heart rate monitor appears, a subtle, rhythmic pulsing SFX is layered into the mix. The speaker's voice remains clear and authoritative above the background music. (6) A sharp 'click' SFX accompanies the visual of the glasses being folded. The music maintains its intensity until the very end, where a final 'pop' SFX signals the conclusion of the video.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Breakdown -> Physical Demo -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a high-energy update and review of the newly announced Meta Aria Gen 2 smart glasses, highlighting technical improvements in sensors and physical design changes like foldability.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Consistent presence of 'miko' logo alongside the tech reviewer's brand, suggesting a collaboration or platform sponsorship.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-density technical overlays and SFX to maintain engagement in a typical 'tech-fluencer' style common on short-form platforms.
